apps.name: PiliPlus
apps.versionDescription:
修复自动全屏
修复有音频流时才启用音量均衡 #1865 by @HeXis-YS
其他

## 2.0.1
页面优化
优化收起顶栏
优化 #1864 by @My-Responsitories
优化加载搜索历史 #1858 by @My-Responsitories

iOS 支持添加 UP 至桌面
支持显示用户收藏集头图
直播封面支持切换预览首帧
支持显示`精选评论`标识 #1857 co-by @Dxee-e
支持记录评论，默认开 by @bggRGjQaUbCoE @My-Responsitories

修复自动全屏
修复动态链接显示
apps.localizedDescription: PiliPlus 客户端，专为更好的体验而生。

apps.name: Feather
apps.versionDescription: Thank you for all your feedback and contributions! > [!TIP] > For `idevice` configuration, you can use [PlumeImpactor](https://github.com/khcrysalis/Impactor?tab=readme-ov-file#pairing-file) for easily retrieving a pairing file for installing! ## What's Changed * Migrated codebase to use the *OS 26 SDK with help from @Nyasami. * Added Liquid Glass icon. * Added iOS 26 BackgroundTasks API for background downloads. * Added appearance options for changing library icon appearance (Light/Dark) on iOS 18.0+ with help from @hugeBlack. * Tinting options are available on iOS 18.2+. * Added appearance options for custom tint color. * Added success alert when updating SSL certificates by @planeklm. * Fixed issue where bundle was using outdated SSL certificates, causing common issues regarding being stuck on "Ready". * Fixed incorrect handling of `NSExtension` modifications by @Nyasami. * Fixed issue where certain app names would not appear in Library by @Nyasami. * Fixed an issue where certain apps weren't able to install by deleting a leftover `_CodeSignature` directory by @Nyasami. * Fixed issue where a malicious `.deb` was able to make Feather crash on launch. * Made the iOS 26+ arm64e slice fixup run regardless of version, mainly for exports. ## Preview | | |:-:| ## New Contributors * @binnichtaktiv made their first contribution in https://github.com/khcrysalis/Feather/pull/548 * @planeklm made their first contribution in https://github.com/khcrysalis/Feather/pull/572 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khcrysalis/Feather/compare/v2.5.0...v2.6.0
apps.localizedDescription: CLARATION 的 Feather 客户端，轻量强大的侧载工具。

versions.localizedDescription: Thank you for all your feedback and contributions! > [!TIP] > For `idevice` configuration, you can use [PlumeImpactor](https://github.com/khcrysalis/Impactor?tab=readme-ov-file#pairing-file) for easily retrieving a pairing file for installing! ## What's Changed * Migrated codebase to use the *OS 26 SDK with help from @Nyasami. * Added Liquid Glass icon. * Added iOS 26 BackgroundTasks API for background downloads. * Added appearance options for changing library icon appearance (Light/Dark) on iOS 18.0+ with help from @hugeBlack. * Tinting options are available on iOS 18.2+. * Added appearance options for custom tint color. * Added success alert when updating SSL certificates by @planeklm. * Fixed issue where bundle was using outdated SSL certificates, causing common issues regarding being stuck on "Ready". * Fixed incorrect handling of `NSExtension` modifications by @Nyasami. * Fixed issue where certain app names would not appear in Library by @Nyasami. * Fixed an issue where certain apps weren't able to install by deleting a leftover `_CodeSignature` directory by @Nyasami. * Fixed issue where a malicious `.deb` was able to make Feather crash on launch. * Made the iOS 26+ arm64e slice fixup run regardless of version, mainly for exports. ## Preview | | |:-:| ## New Contributors * @binnichtaktiv made their first contribution in https://github.com/khcrysalis/Feather/pull/548 * @planeklm made their first contribution in https://github.com/khcrysalis/Feather/pull/572 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/khcrysalis/Feather/compare/v2.5.0...v2.6.0
